title: Welcome And Goodbye
description: Welcomes your fellow server member with a goodbye message
body: With this simple plugin you can welcome your server members in chat. With a custum message in config.yml ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15015fd28daf4236b1cc08b7a04d4224a9e6c32a.png) # Commands - /wag reload This reloads the config.yml - /wag help shows available info about the commands - /wag preview join/quit/first preview the messages - /wag toggle see toggles when other leaves or join - /wag debug on/off see debuging logs # Deafault Config ![deafult config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47d85ea44726bfdc0cec7037022720f5e9f2b713.png) In the config.yml you can edit the join message and the quit message that others can see. You can use Mini Message to edit the colors in 1.0.2 You can now edit Default, Morning, Afternoon, Evening and Night messages You can edit the debug silent and vanish Toggle silent, the op can be invinible in the chat when joining and leaving
